name: Batch H.265 Video Converter
description: Batch convert video files to H.265/HEVC using FFmpeg with configurable quality and encoding settings.
requirements: Node v18+, ffmpeg and ffprobe installed (brew install ffmpeg)
author: superpowers

input_schema.name: input-folder
input_schema.label: Input Folder
input_schema.description: Folder containing video files to convert

input_schema.name: output-folder
input_schema.label: Output Folder
input_schema.description: Where to save converted files (leave empty to save alongside originals)

input_schema.name: crf
input_schema.label: Quality (CRF)
input_schema.description: Constant Rate Factor: 0 = lossless, 28 = default, 51 = worst. Lower = better quality & larger file.

input_schema.name: preset
input_schema.label: Encoding Preset
input_schema.description: Slower presets achieve better compression but take longer to encode.

input_schema.name: tune
input_schema.label: Tune
input_schema.description: Optimise encoding for a specific type of content.

input_schema.name: audio
input_schema.label: Audio Codec
input_schema.description: "copy" remuxes audio without re-encoding (fast, lossless). "aac" or "mp3" re-encode audio.

input_schema.name: audio-bitrate
input_schema.label: Audio Bitrate
input_schema.description: Only applies when audio is re-encoded (not when using "copy").

input_schema.name: container
input_schema.label: Output Container
input_schema.description: MP4 is broadly compatible; MKV supports more codec/subtitle combinations.

input_schema.name: hw-accel
input_schema.label: Hardware Acceleration
input_schema.description: "videotoolbox" uses Apple GPU on macOS (faster, slightly lower quality). "none" uses CPU.
